Document:
# Smithing In order to unlock smithing, research the research entry with the same name.
Smithing allows you to create various weaponry and armor out of steel. In order to begin, you need 2 main things, both of which are unlocked via research: anvil and smithing gloves.
The actual process of smithing requires that you place metal on the anvil. Smithing gloves are required in order to be able to hold molten metal. There are also 2 main tools used in smithing: hammer and chisel.
In order to begin smithing, get a molten steel ingot from the smeltery, place it on an anvil, then apply tools in the correct order to make the item you need. Keep in mind that molten items will eventually cool down, meaning you have to start over. When you smith the end result, it will automatically be in cooled form. In order to complete a weapon, add a handle to the smithed blade, or follow construction instructions otherwise.
In order to make an item from the molten steel ingot, you need to use a tool three times - either the hammer or the chisel. Feel free to experiment with various outcomes - see what you can make!
